bottleneck_identified: The `minimally-invasive-spine-surgery` service page embedded a YouTube iframe without `loading="lazy"`. This caused immediate network congestion and heavy third-party script execution during initial page load, delaying LCP and severely blocking the main thread (harming INP).
expected_improvement: Directly improves LCP and INP metrics on this service page by deferring the download and execution of the heavy YouTube player until the user scrolls near the video section, freeing up the main thread during initial page load.
how_to_verify: 1. Run `pnpm dev`. 2. Open `http://localhost:3000/services/minimally-invasive-spine-surgery`. 3. Open Network tab and Performance tab. 4. Verify that the YouTube assets (like `base.js`, `player_ias.vflset/en_US/base.js`) and iframe document are not downloaded immediately upon page load, but only when you scroll down to the 'Watch: Endoscopic Discectomy' section. 5. Run a Lighthouse performance audit.
